tools.name: wire_status
tools.description: Get Wire VPN status - shows if VPN is running, connected peers, and network info

tools.name: wire_peers
tools.description: List all connected VPN peers with their endpoints and connection status

tools.name: wire_install
tools.description: Get instructions to install Wire VPN on this machine

tools.name: wire_diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose Wire VPN issues - checks WireGuard installation, connectivity, and service status

tools.name: wire_connect
tools.description: Get command to connect to a Wire VPN network

tools.name: wire_add_node
tools.description: Add a new node to the Wire VPN network. Returns setup instructions.

node_name.description: Name for the new node (e.g., web1, db1)

public_ip.description: Public IP if this is a relay node (optional)

tools.name: wire_remove_node
tools.description: Remove a node from the Wire VPN network

node_name.description: Name of the node to remove

tools.name: wire_watchdog
tools.description: Check Wire VPN watchdog and auto-recovery status. Shows service health, stale peers, and recommendations.
